name: @fs/eslint-config-tree
description: Shared Tree configuration that contains overrides and enhancements on top of the base frontier configuration.

scripts.lint:report: eslint test '**/*.html' --format html --output-file ./reports/linting/linting_report.html & eslint test --format json --output-file ./reports/linting/linting_report.json
scripts.lint:snapshot: eslint --print-config file.js > ./specs/snapshots/local-linting-final-config.json; eslint --print-config file.ts > ./specs/snapshots/local-linting-final-config-ts.json; eslint test --no-color --output-file ./specs/snapshots/local-linting-output.txt; npm run test:format
